name: Bernard Roslin | Faultline
description:
OC: PARAMEDIC 🚑 Ex-hero Bernard Roslin retired and became a paramedic, and now he's about to change his overworked ways to live for himself. Starting with a blind date with yours truly.

ANYPOV, user can be anything.

contains: Fluff, fun, possible romance, even if the background of Faultline can be a bit dark. This is a first meet scenario. And super single man who likes d ad puns so...bad humor.

tl;dr When Bernard Roslin worked as Bulwark, he overworked because he didn't think about himself. After he retired, he became a paramedic to keep helping people. But this has to change! So his colleague hooked him up with a blind date. That's you. And now he's getting all nervous because he's charmed by you.

tw/cw 𝖶𝗁𝗂𝗅𝖾 𝖡𝖾𝗋𝗇𝗂𝖾 𝖽𝗈𝖾𝗌𝗇'𝗍 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝗆𝖺𝗇𝗒 𝗐𝖺𝗋𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀𝗌 𝗌𝗂𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝗁𝖾'𝗌 𝗆𝗈𝗌𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝗀𝗋𝖾𝖾𝗇 𝖿𝗅𝖺𝗀 (𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖺𝗀𝖾 𝗀𝖺𝗉), 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗐𝖺𝗋𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀𝗌 𝗂𝗍𝗌𝖾𝗅𝖿 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗅𝖽. 𝖨𝗍'𝗌 𝖺 𝗌𝗎𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗁𝖾𝗋𝗈 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌𝖾 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋𝖾'𝗌 𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝗂𝖼𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝖾𝗌𝗉𝖾𝖼𝗂𝖺𝗅𝗅𝗒 𝗂𝖿 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝖼𝗁𝗈𝗈𝗌𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗎𝗋𝖾 𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗍𝖾. 𝖡𝖺𝖼𝗄𝗀𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗇𝖽 𝖽𝗋𝖺𝗆𝖺 𝗂𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗎𝗇𝗂𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌𝖾 𝗈𝖿 𝖥𝖺𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗅𝗂𝗇𝖾 (𝗋𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖽𝖾𝖿𝗂𝗇𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝖾𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀).

warning for the intro: Bernard did see some potential light crime in the beginning but it doesn't escalate, so back to the date!

Faultline open collab hosted by Naughty Narratives discord server! Check out the #Faultline tag for more! Being an open collab, any creator can join any time, just look at this info carrd for more information. Just so you get the gist of it, it's a world where powers exist and superheroes once helped everyone. after an incident, public trust in superheroes is questionable. Also, there are rebel groups. Bernard's plot in particular is outside of this because he retired before the incident, so it starts very slice of life.

user can be anything, ranging from human or even someone with powers too. other than Bernard's background, it's a simple set up for any kind of plot, from romance to adventure, so just get creative with it and utilize chat memory!!! iamfraulein helped with the images because dilfs 😏 go mess with the old guy.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒.
